title: Duplicate Charge Guidance
snippet: If you see two charges, gather transaction IDs and contact official billing support for refund review.

title: Subscription Charged Twice
snippet: Adding devices or renewing plans can appear as duplicate billing; verify subscription terms and invoice IDs.

title: Billing Support Escalation
snippet: Community threads may not process account refunds directly; route users to authenticated support channels.

title: Reset Email Troubleshooting
snippet: Check spam/junk and confirm sender domains are allowlisted before retrying password reset.

title: SSO and Password Reset
snippet: For SSO-managed users, direct password reset may fail; verify identity provider login path first.

title: Email Delivery and Region Check
snippet: Confirm account email and regional portal are correct before concluding reset email delivery failure.

title: 500 Error Capture Checklist
snippet: Capture timestamp, endpoint, and action sequence when 500 occurs to help reproduce the server issue.

title: Post-Upgrade Error Triage
snippet: If failures begin after upgrade, compare dependency versions and recent config changes first.

title: Crash After Feature Toggle
snippet: When crashes start after enabling new settings, test with the feature disabled and collect logs.

title: Dark Mode Request Pattern
snippet: Common feature ask: dark mode support and automatic theme sync with OS preference.

title: Theme Automation Request
snippet: Users often request separate light/dark themes and auto-switch behavior by system setting.

title: Dark Mode Scope Control
snippet: Feature requests may include exclusions for sites/apps already using native dark themes.

title: Support Channel Clarification
snippet: Some forums provide peer guidance only; account-specific actions require authenticated support routes.

title: Account Recovery Preconditions
snippet: If password reset fails, first verify account existence and registration details.

title: Reset Notification Delivery Steps
snippet: Mail filtering and sender reputation can block reset notifications; validate mail security settings.
